name: jaequery
description: Jae Lee's curated arsenal of 16 slash-command skills: Paul Graham startup playbook (validate-problem, find-customers, build-mvp, growth-strategy, map-competition, pressure-test-idea), Deep Dive Analysis expert panel, next-feature tournament, evidence-gated code review, Shark Tank evaluation, git audit, SEO suite, market research, Reddit marketing, cmux diff viewer, and Cursor-style runtime debug-trace. All 161 specialist subagents (engineering, design, marketing, sales, etc.) and the multi-agent build / design-variants / Linear + GitHub + Planbooq backlog burndown skills now live in the standalone supabuild plugin.
